key_evidence: Liberties.eu 2026 Rule of Law Report classifies Bulgaria as Dismantler state — sector-sweep corroboration from May 22 Slovakia apply
Sustained corruption indicators, judicial independence concerns, media concentration, anti-LGBTQ legislative pressure documented in 2024-2026 country reports
Dismantler magnitude calibration: -5.5 by parity with Slovakia (similar mid-Developing baseline that already prices significant rule-of-law concern)
Bulgaria published 35.9 baseline already partially prices concern; marginal evidence from formal Liberties.eu classification
First-baseline rotation assessment — extends Dismantler-class apply to Bulgaria; Italy remains unassessed under this classification
methodology_novel: Application of Croatia/Slovakia Dismantler magnitude precedent to Bulgaria — confirms the 'magnitude scales to starting position' rule, -5.5 for mid-Developing baselines (Slovakia parity).
